title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with LIC! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
